title: ホープフルSの後に・火花散る

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's name travels far as her exploits
fill the audience of the Hopeful Stakes with
wonder after she has a successful run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the first race in the Triple Crown
tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit burns brightly as we
head down the path of the Satsuki Sho!
